resources.string: Missing permissions; notifications may be blocked (checked every launch):
Notifications may be blocked (set Queen Alerts to High in system settings):
· App notifications are disabled in system settings
· Queen Alerts channel importance too low (set to High / Priority)
· Calendar read/write (required before submit; Queen will take over your schedule)
· Modify system settings (required before submit; Queen will rewrite your system)
· Set wallpaper (required before submit; Queen applies wallpapers after activation)
· Nearby devices / Bluetooth (to rename device to Queen slave ID, Android 12+)
· Notifications + master switch (required before submit for Queen alerts)
· Camera (required before submit for daily proof photos)
· Display over other apps (Xiaomi: also enable overlay & autostart)
· Allow background activity (disable battery optimization for this app)
· Notification listener enabled but not connected: toggle Queen listener off and on
Modify system settings not granted. Enable it in system settings, return, then submit the code.
